# Containers Day

> Cloud Native conference in Santiago, Dominican Republic — August 22, 2026.

## URLs
- Site: https://containers.day
- Tickets: https://cap.uapa.edu.do/producto/containers-day-2026/
- CFP: https://sessionize.com/containers-days-dr/

## Tech Stack
- Static site: Hugo 0.128+
- Theme: event (submodule from medialesson/hugo-theme-event)
- Hosting: GitHub Pages
- Auth: Firebase (Google Auth)
- Database: Firestore
- CDN: Bootstrap 5.3, Font Awesome 5.15, Animate.css
- Languages: Spanish (default), English

## Content Structure
| Path | Description |
|---|---|
| `content/` | Spanish content |
| `content/en/` | English content |
| `content/speakers/` | Speaker profiles |
| `content/sessions/` | Session/schedule data |
| `i18n/` | Translation files (es.yaml, en.yaml, de.yaml) |
| `themes/event/` | Theme with layouts, partials, assets |
| `static/` | Static files (images, logos, PDFs) |

## Key Pages
- `/` — Homepage (ES)
- `/en/` — Homepage (EN)
- `/speakers/` — Speaker list
- `/sessions/` — Schedule
- `/sponsors/` — Sponsors
- `/tourism/` — Travel info
- `/code-of-conduct/` — Code of conduct

## SEO Configuration
- Default language: es
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Canonical: self-referencing
- Structured data: Event + Organization schema
- Robots.txt: at /robots.txt
